_meta.purpose: Tunable weights for the multi-objective placement scorecard. Each placement decision sums these components into a total score; lower total = higher priority.
_meta.convention: All weights are POSITIVE. They scale a per-component PENALTY (low = good fit). The engine sorts ascending — the candidate with the lowest summed penalty wins. Increase a weight to make that component matter more.

tuning_examples.skill_match: Increase if you want the strongest TM in tough zones more aggressively.
tuning_examples.preference_fit: Increase if you want the engine to honor preferences more strictly (less likely to override).
tuning_examples.pair_affinity: Increase if pair conflicts are causing real productivity issues.
tuning_examples.fatigue_index: Increase if rockstars are getting burned out.
tuning_examples.within_repeat: Increase to push harder against same-slot repeats this week.
tuning_examples.cross_week_rotation: Increase to push harder for week-over-week variety.

_meta.transparency: Every placement decision logs its component breakdown to the audit. Open the JSON audit to see why each TM was chosen (or not).
